shared_attributes.design_principle: maximum clarity at minimum size, non-intrusive

context.role: displays Echo's current happiness level (0-100), only persistent UI element
context.usage_scenario: always visible, updates in real-time as happiness changes, color-coded by happiness level

visual_specification.shape: horizontal bar, filled proportionally to happiness value

animation.description: fill width updates dynamically based on happiness value (0-100), color changes at thresholds (50-69=orange, 70-89=yellow, 90-100=green)

visual_specification.details: background bar (#5F574F) 120px wide, fill bar overlays from left, fill width = (happiness/100) * 120px, color determined by happiness range, positioned at y=126-127 (bottom 2px of screen)

relationships.shared_with: color scheme reflects happiness states (green=ecstatic, yellow=happy, orange=content)
relationships.differences_from: only persistent UI element (always visible), dynamically updates unlike static environment, overlays game screen

explicit_negations: no animation between color changes (instant switch at thresholds)
